# Security Policy

## Supported Versions

Security updates are provided for the latest default branch.

## Reporting a Vulnerability

Please report vulnerabilities via GitHub Security Advisories when possible.
If unavailable, open a private issue with reproduction details and impact scope.

What to include:

- Affected component/path
- Reproduction steps or proof-of-concept
- Impact assessment
- Suggested mitigation (if known)

We will acknowledge reports and provide mitigation guidance as soon as practical.
